testcase.name: Two users can create and join the same room

error.message:
Handshake status 404 Not Found -+-+- {'connection': 'Keep-Alive', 'server': 'Embedthis-http', 'cache-control': 'no-cache', 'date': 'Mon, 06 Apr 2026 16:04:47 GMT', 'content-length': '173', 'keep-alive': 'timeout=60, max=199'} -+-+- b' Not Found

Access Error: 404 -- Not Found

Cannot open document for: /room
'

testcase.error:
Failing step: And WebSocket client "alice" is connected ... error in 0.013s Location: features/chat_room.feature:6 Traceback (most recent call last): File "C:\Programming\My source\PhantomChat.BlackboxTestBDD\.venv\Lib\site-packages\websocket\_handshake.py", line 66, in handshake status, resp = _get_resp_headers(sock) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^ File "C:\Programming\My 16:04:47 GMT', 'content-length': '173', 'keep-alive': 'timeout=60, max=199'} -+-+- b'\r\nNot Found\r\n\r\n

Access Error: 404 -- Not Found

\r\n
Cannot open document for: /room
\r\n\r\n\r\n'
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario: Two users can create and join the same room Given a unique room alias "main_room" ... passed in 0.001s And WebSocket client "alice" is connected ... error in 0.013s And WebSocket client "bob" is connected ... skipped in 0.000s When client "alice" joins room "main_room" with a generated libsodium-style public key ... skipped in 0.000s Then the response for client "alice" should contain ... skipped in 0.000s | field | value | | status | 0 | | room_created | true | | room_name | main_room | | members | alice | When client "bob" joins room "main_room" with a generated libsodium-style public key ... skipped in 0.000s Then the response for client "bob" should contain ... skipped in 0.000s | field | value | | status | 0 | | room_created | false | | room_name | main_room | | members | alice,bob | And client "alice" should receive a "UserEnteredRoom" event containing ... skipped in 0.000s | field | value | | room_name | main_room | | user_uuid | bob |
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: A joined user can send a chat message to the room

error.message:
Handshake status 404 Not Found -+-+- {'connection': 'Keep-Alive', 'server': 'Embedthis-http', 'cache-control': 'no-cache', 'date': 'Mon, 06 Apr 2026 16:04:47 GMT', 'content-length': '173', 'keep-alive': 'timeout=60, max=199'} -+-+- b' Not Found

Access Error: 404 -- Not Found

Cannot open document for: /room
'

testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario: A joined user can send a chat message to the room Given a unique room alias "chat_room" ... passed in 0.001s And WebSocket client "alice" is connected ... error in 0.006s And WebSocket client "bob" is connected ... skipped in 0.000s And client "alice" joins room "chat_room" with a generated libsodium-style public key ... skipped in 0.000s And client "bob" joins room "chat_room" with a generated libsodium-style public key ... skipped in 0.000s When client "alice" sends chat message "hello from behave" ... skipped in 0.000s Then the response for client "alice" should contain ... skipped in 0.000s | field | value | | status | 0 | | message | hello from behave | And client "alice" should receive a "NewMessageReceived" event containing ... skipped in 0.000s | field | value | | sender_uuid | alice | | message | hello from behave | And client "bob" should receive a "NewMessageReceived" event containing ... skipped in 0.000s | field | value | | sender_uuid | alice | | message | hello from behave |
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: The server rejects a chat message from a client outside any room

error.message:
Handshake status 404 Not Found -+-+- {'connection': 'Keep-Alive', 'server': 'Embedthis-http', 'cache-control': 'no-cache', 'date': 'Mon, 06 Apr 2026 16:04:47 GMT', 'content-length': '173', 'keep-alive': 'timeout=60, max=199'} -+-+- b' Not Found

Access Error: 404 -- Not Found

Cannot open document for: /room
'

testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario: The server rejects a chat message from a client outside any room Given WebSocket client "alice" is connected ... error in 0.004s When client "alice" sends chat message "this should fail" ... skipped in 0.000s Then the response for client "alice" should contain ... skipped in 0.000s | field | value | | status | 1 | | message | User not in a room |
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Leaving a room notifies the remaining participants

error.message:
Handshake status 404 Not Found -+-+- {'connection': 'Keep-Alive', 'server': 'Embedthis-http', 'cache-control': 'no-cache', 'date': 'Mon, 06 Apr 2026 16:04:47 GMT', 'content-length': '173', 'keep-alive': 'timeout=60, max=199'} -+-+- b' Not Found

'

testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario: Leaving a room notifies the remaining participants Given a unique room alias "leave_room" ... passed in 0.001s And WebSocket client "alice" is connected ... error in 0.006s And WebSocket client "bob" is connected ... skipped in 0.000s And client "alice" joins room "leave_room" with a generated libsodium-style public key ... skipped in 0.000s And client "bob" joins room "leave_room" with a generated libsodium-style public key ... skipped in 0.000s When client "bob" leaves the current room ... skipped in 0.000s Then the response for client "bob" should contain ... skipped in 0.000s | field | value | | status | 0 | | message | Left room | And client "alice" should receive a "LeaveRoom" event containing ... skipped in 0.000s | field | value | | user_uuid | bob |
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
